---
title: "assignment"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

#Library

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(epiwraps)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(AnnotationHub)
  library(ensembldb)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(edgeR)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(bsseq)   # Class and tools to analyze bisulfite sequencing data at CpG-level
  library(DMRcate) # Identification of differentially-methylated regions
})
```

#Load data


```{r, download, eval=FALSE}
setwd("C:/Users/lo/Desktop/master/bioinformatics/week8")
getwd()
list.files()
options(timeout = 6000)
download.file("https://ethz-ins.org/content/w11_practical.zip", "w11_practical.zip")
unzip("w11_practical.zip")
```




```{r}
# Load data 
bs <- readRDS("ESC_astrocytes_BSseq.rds")

```


# Data preparation


```{r}


bs <- bs[rowSums(assay(bs, "Cov") > 0) == ncol(bs), ]

design <- model.matrix(~celltype, data = pData(bs))
methdesign <- modelMatrixMeth(design)


bs <- BSmooth(bs, BPPARAM=MulticoreParam(4, progress=TRUE))

# Annotate for DMRcate
seqAnnot <- sequencing.annotate(
  bs,
  methdesign,
  all.cov = TRUE,
  coef = "celltypeastrocytes"
)

```

#DMR
```{r}


dmrcateRes <- dmrcate(seqAnnot, C = 2, min.cpgs = 5)
dmrRanges <- extractRanges(dmrcateRes, genome = "hg19")


dmr_chr1 <- dmrRanges[seqnames(dmrRanges) == "chr1"]
dmr_chr1 <- dmr_chr1[order(abs(dmr_chr1$meandiff), decreasing = TRUE)]



```


# Plot

```{r}

top5_dmrs <- head(dmr_chr1, 5)


metDMRs <- bsseq::getMeth(
  bs,
  regions = top5_dmrs,
  what = "perRegion"
)


colnames(metDMRs) <- colnames(bs)


rownames(metDMRs) <- paste0(
  "DMR_", seq_len(nrow(metDMRs)),
  "_chr", seqnames(top5_dmrs),
  ":", start(top5_dmrs), "-", end(top5_dmrs)
)


pheatmap(
  metDMRs,
  name = "methylation"
)
```



# Part 2


```{r}


atac <- readRDS("ATAC_AstroVsESC_subset.rds")
head(atac)
head(dmrRanges)
```


```{r}

atac_clean <- GRanges(
  seqnames = seqnames(atac),
  ranges   = ranges(atac),
  logFC    = atac$logFC,
  FDR      = atac$FDR
)

dmr_clean <- GRanges(
  seqnames = seqnames(dmrRanges),
  ranges   = ranges(dmrRanges),
  meandiff = dmrRanges$meandiff
)

hits <- findOverlaps(dmr_clean, atac_clean)


matched <- data.frame(
  meandiff = mcols(dmr_clean)$meandiff[queryHits(hits)],
  logFC    = mcols(atac_clean)$logFC[subjectHits(hits)],
  FDR      = mcols(atac_clean)$FDR[subjectHits(hits)]
)


ggplot(matched, aes(x = meandiff, y = logFC)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = FDR < 0.05), alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("grey70", "steelblue"),
                      labels = c("ns", "FDR < 0.05")) +
  labs(x = "DMR mean methylation difference",
       y = "ATAC logFC",
       colour = "ATAC significance",
       title  = "Methylation vs Chromatin Accessibility") +
  theme_bw()


cor.test(matched$meandiff, matched$logFC, method = "spearman")
```


```{mermaid}
 We overlapped differentially methylated regions (DMRs) with differential ATAC-seq peaks and compared the direction of change (methylation difference vs. log fold change in accessibility) using a scatter plot and Spearman correlation.
There is a significant negative correlation (ρ = −0.26, p < 2.2e-16), indicating that regions gaining methylation in astrocytes tend to become less accessible, and vice versa — consistent with DNA methylation being associated with closed chromatin. The modest effect size suggests this relationship holds genome-wide but is not the only regulatory mechanism at play.

```
